feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Would you date an Italian woman?
entry.content: Would you date an Italian woman?
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Dedicated Anti Brock Observance Nexus #1
entry.content: Welcome to the very first Dedicated Anti Brock Observance Nexus, or DABON for short. Post about your hatred for Brock, why you hate Brock, speculate or make declarative statements about Brock's sexuality (gay), make fun of Brock, tell stories about Brock, make up stories about Brock. Assess Brock's station in life relative to his age. Feel free to discuss or make fun of Brock elsewhere, if the mood strikes you, or if you encounter Brock acting gay (100% of his waking hours). However, we can use
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I literally just realized that the reason that this feels so wrong is because it…
entry.content: I literally just realized that the reason that this feels so wrong is because it feels like a third party knockoff of Avatar instead of a continuation. The introduction of all new characters and elements which are just repeats of things from the previous show reads literally like someone in a boardroom got a bunch of people together and said "alright, I need you to magic me up a new IP like that popular Avatar show. What do you got?"
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /int/ International: Thoughts on the Italian Co-belligerent Army in your country?
entry.content: 1. Your country 2. What are your thoughts on the Italian Co-belligerent Army? United States I think it's super interesting and underappreciated. Italians are generally just thought of as a lesser Axis member in WWII but thousands were killed fighting for the Allies and nobody remembers it. The initial engagements in particular are really tragic since Italian units were torn based on allegiance and surrounded and outnumbered by Germans. >Why post this on /int/ instead of /his/? I genuinely want t
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: after getting expelled from school for wearing a bikini and leather jacket and s…
entry.content: after getting expelled from school for wearing a bikini and leather jacket and slamming my switchblade into my school desk I've been in kind of a weird place I don't really know how I should feel anymore why is school so fake stupid and gay? I had my knife confiscated and I was handcuffed by security and thrown out. I started thinking about knife fighting a lot, why do they always show switchblades in the movies? I was thinking if I ever get into a knife fight, I'm going to get a big hunting kni
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Auto shop manager here. I assure you that even an old clunker car is by far a mu…
entry.content: Auto shop manager here. I assure you that even an old clunker car is by far a much better investment than a brand new car. These new cars are becoming almost impossible for anyone to fix. I even had to pay one of my employees to get an associates degree in electrical engineering technology just to work on new bmw i3s. I literally had to retire early because I can't take this EV craze anymore. I swear to God sooner or later nobody will know how to fix cars anymore
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /b/ Random: Do You Make Music?
entry.content: let's hear some of your original music. I'll go first: I created this song from scratch, sequencing it on FL Studio https://voca.ro/1j4hKH4LaUG2 It's called SHES GONE...... it's about my cat, who tragically died while giving birth. I particularly like the extended intro... I hope you like it, too NOW I WANT TO HEAR SOME OF YOUR ORIGINAL MUSIC. Any musically inclined creative individuals feel free to upload some of your songs, even if they're not perfect... It doesn't have to be perfect Making mu

entry.title: /news/ News: 11 States sue to Block Paramount's Corpo Fascist $110 Billion Warner Bros. Deal
entry.content: The deal which was heavily pushed by trump, who also personally sabotaged a previous deal with Netflix which would have kept Warner Bros apolitical, is part of the fascist right wing's prolonged campaign to take over all of American media to cover up information, like trump being a central figure in the epstein list and covering up his regime's historical level of corruption. https://www.reuters.com/world/urgen t-california-11-states-suing-block- paramounts-110-billion-warner-bros- deal-2026-07-
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The f…
entry.content: There have only been two times in my life when I've ever been high on THC. The first time, when I was 14, I had to smoke five joints in a row before I felt anything. Other times, I tried smoking as many as three joints in a row and felt nothing. The high when I was 14 was sort of like everything slowing down drastically, and the thought of "passing out high" kept repeating in my head. On Thursday, almost 20 years later, I got high on THC again, but this was definitely a very different experience
entry.dc:creator: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /ntrslop/ - Netorare AI Slop General #73

Orcs, goblins, femboys, futa, demons, and similar themes are fine too. Reverse NTR and Lesbian NTR is fine

entry.title: /g/ Technology: So why does it take my modern, 32 core + 128GB DDR5 Ram + 4090 computer literal …
entry.content: So why does it take my modern, 32 core + 128GB DDR5 Ram + 4090 computer literal seconds to perform a trivial operation such as resizing an image to be under 4MB so i can post it to this fucking website? The code is written in Rust even. It's absolutely something systemic too because convert on debian is slow as balls as well taking several seconds to convert a simple image I expect a modern system to be able to resize hundreds of images per second. Am i crazy?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Younger people stealing Millennial video games
entry.content: I am 36, work at CVS, and I have a 22yo coworker born in 2004. I know talking with your co-workers about vidya is a meme, but I do it anyway with this kid. Most of his favorite games are PS2 games like FFX and Sly Cooper. It pisses me off and I have to constantly remind him that he was born after that era and never truly experienced them, and that emulating them or buying them today doesn't count. He doesn't see an issue with it and always says shit like "well people listen to bands before their
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Cynicism of post-apocalyptic narratives
entry.content: Not sure if this belongs here or /lit/, /his/, /v/ or even /pol/, but have you noticed how cynical all post-apocalyptic narratives are about the human nature and people's relationship with the authority? In every post-apocalyptic narrative it is expected that once the government begins to crumble, humans start forming cannibal rape gangs. Why is it that the state is necessary for humans to form a morally coherent society? Does morality come from the government authority? Now, I am not an anarchi
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is there a good explanation for why CGI has taken a million steps backwards sinc…
entry.content: Is there a good explanation for why CGI has taken a million steps backwards since 2010. The year is 2026 and nobody gives a fuck about movies anymore including the people that make them. But CGI just seems like something that's impossible to make go backwards. Despite that, it has. There's bad CGI and then there's "bad CGI". Jurassic Park is objectively "bad CGI". It was mind boggling when it came out, but it's objectively bad because when you compare it to modern technology it does not look rea
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Remember when Macintosh computers were aimed at the wishy-washy legacyfagging crowd?
entry.content: Copland crashed and burned, because it turns out you can't build something from scratch if you're integrating the components that fucked things up in the first place. Maybe Dave Cutler had a point! NT has weathered 30+ years of shit on top, and it's likely the last bastion of Windows' stability.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.content: https://www.mv.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr top_en/index.html We should appreciate japan more. They are the only country giving aid without scamming us or getting anything in return. Check out the embassy website. They donate lots of equipment, constantly. They had actually donated a bariatric chamber, that the sifain could have used to save that diver during the cave rescue thing. Its the kind of thing they should have had on the diving boat. but alas it was nowhere to be seen. Everything is probably s

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Out of over 100 characters only a small handful are actually viable if you wann…
entry.content: >Out of over 100 characters only a small handful are actually viable if you wanna play above the lowest rank >Out of those handful 2-3 are clearly Dev pets and never get nerfed >If you want to play them you need to invest hundreds of hours of our ever fleeting lives into mastering them >Once you do they'll finally get nerfed into obscurity and you have to start over I don't understand people who play the ASSFAGGOTS genre. Getting an actual job would be less time intensive and more rewarding.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games
